step_rationale: Amino acid downregulated in myocardial injury; reflects altered cardiac energetics and necrosis.
mechanism: Glutamate depletion in acute myocarditis marks cardiomyocyte dysfunction and altered mitochondrial metabolism.

references.title: Metabolic Profiling Reveals Diagnostic Biomarkers for Distinguishing Myocarditis From Acute Myocardial Infarction.
